details: The Prosecution responded today by getting ANOTHER 28-day extension. that will push out the response date to about July 1st. Andrew will spend another 30 days in jail... for no reason.
The prosecution responded by getting a 30-day extension. This pushes the response date to about June 5th, and Andrew remains in jail another 30 days.
The original brief for the appeal was filed. The prosecution has 28 days to respond, and an additional postponement may push the response into early June.
The hearing was held without Andrew's attorney present. Andrew's papers and belongings were returned in a box, and some items were damaged.
Danny Bower (Andrew's attorney) submitted a stipulation to reset the date
A hearing about the document seizure was scheduled for March 19, 2026.
Hearing was scheduled on the Motion to Seize documents (but the docs were already seized.) The Order was given to do it.

Prosecution filed a 'Motion for In Camera Review' meaning they wanted the judge (in her chambers) to review the material. Supposedly Andrew had material he should not have had -- copies of Rachel's interviews or something.
Marshalls swooped in and took all of Andrew's personal belongings from his cell. He was not given a reason. They even spilled water on some of his papers so they were unreadable.
Appeal Filed in Supreme Court.
Substitution of Counsel -- EE (Andrew's defense attorney) not doing appeal. Daniel B___ brought in to do the appeal.

Andrew taken from Ada County Jail about this date (not exact) and transferred to the Jerome County Jail. He should have gone to the prison in Kuna, Idaho, which is an Idaho State Correctional Center. Chad Daybell and Bryan Kohberger are there.
Judgment of Conviction & Order of Commitment.
10am Re-sentencing due to mistaken sentence given.
Sentencing Hearing.
Motion for New Trial
Jury sent out for deliberation. Jury returned verdict of 'Guilty'
8:30am Jury Trial begins
Pre-trial Conference
Jury Trial 'vacated' and reset
Substitution of Counsel -- New Attorney: EE (name withheld for now)
9:30am Pre-trial Conference
Hung Jury -- Mistrial declared.
9am Jury Trial Started
9am Pre-trial Conference
9:30am Status Conference held
1:30pm Arraignment Hearing held.
1:30pm Arraignment Hearing held.
Felony 'Information' Filed (Marks the beginning of the time for a 'speedy' trial.)
1:30pm Preliminary Hearing -- Held. Andrew 'bound over' for trial.
Preliminary Hearing -- 'continued' (postponed)
Preliminary Hearing -- 'continued' (postponed)
Preliminary Hearing -- 'continued' (postponed)
1:30pm Andrew is 'arraigned' in District Court charged with Conspiracy to Commit Murder in the First Degree.
Andrew is assigned two Public Defenders.
Andrew's Bail is set at 1 MILLION DOLLARS!
Rachel confesses to the sex with Sp___ (name withheld for privacy).
Andrew drives Rachel to Sp___'s home to 'drop her off.'
Andrew and Rachel leave Sp___'s location.
Andrew and Rachel are arrested about 6-7 blocks from Sp___'s home.
Andrew brings Rachel to his home for the talk.
Andrew and Rachel agree to talk over their relationship.
Rachel has an intimate 'date' with Sp___.
